response.step_by_step_log: Reviewed the entire video. The video contains background music, but it is purely instrumental and does not contain any vocal performances or lyrics. Therefore, no song identification or lyric search was performed. The video structure is: promotional merch display, ambassador message, merchandise details, fan messages, and final concert promotion.
response.global_summary: The video promotes the Hololive English 3rd Concert merchandise titled 'ALLFORONE'. It includes a message from VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis, a slide showing merchandise options and sales dates, and a series of collages featuring fan messages of support. There is background music throughout, but it is instrumental and does not contain lyrics.

scenes.description: Promotional graphic for 'ALLFORONE' merchandise featuring various character items. Background music is instrumental.
VTuber Ninomae Ina'nis speaks to the camera in front of an AmiAmi 25th anniversary backdrop. Background music is instrumental.
Slide displaying 'Made-to-Order Merch' items (Tapestry, Acrylic Panel, Mug, Happi) with prices and sales period. Background music is instrumental.
A series of slides showing fan messages of support for the 'ALLFORONE' concert. Background music is instrumental.
Final promotional screen for 'On the Run!' Hololive English -Advent- 2nd Anniversary Live. Background music is instrumental.
